chunks.text: Hello, my name is Hush Pritial and I am currently a third year beta student in computer science
with a specialization in artificial intelligence and machine learning at Vietibu Bar.
I have focused on building a career in data science with a strong proficiency in Python
and a solid foundation in Java.
I enjoy applying machine learning models and statistical techniques, real world problems.
One of my key projects is a smart career advisor system where I build a machine learning
based communication system using over 20,000 data samples collected across different platforms
such as LinkedIn, GitHub and web screen.
I implemented and compared multiple models in closing SVM,
Vietibu and XG Boost achieving an accuracy of 93.3% using assembled techniques.
The system analyzes the academic performance, technical skills and interests to provide
personalized career recommendations. In addition, I have worked on projects like
disease-ordered prediction and bank marketing ML models using real world data sets.
Currently, I am a project contributor at AI innovators hub where I collaborate on real
world AI problems in team based environment. My goal is to secure a data science loan
where I can apply analytical thinking and build impactful solutions.
Thank you for this opportunity. Thank you very much.

text: Hello, my name is Hush Pritial and I am currently a third year beta student in computer science with a specialization in artificial intelligence and machine learning at Vietibu Bar. I have focused on building a career in data science with a strong proficiency in Python and a solid foundation in Java. I enjoy applying machine learning models and statistical techniques, real world problems. One of my key projects is a smart career advisor system where I build a machine learning based communication system using over 20,000 data samples collected across different platforms such as LinkedIn, GitHub and web screen. I implemented and compared multiple models in closing SVM, Vietibu and XG Boost achieving an accuracy of 93.3% using assembled techniques. The system analyzes the academic performance, technical skills and interests to provide personalized career recommendations. In addition, I have worked on projects like disease-ordered prediction and bank marketing ML models using real world data sets. Currently, I am a project contributor at AI innovators hub where I collaborate on real world AI problems in team based environment. My goal is to secure a data science loan where I can apply analytical thinking and build impactful solutions. Thank you for this opportunity. Thank you very much.
